pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:12 defines PROJECT_DIR and creates the directory used by the compose project.
setup_task.sh:31 writes the service definitions to $PROJECT_DIR/docker-compose.yml, confirming this is the compose_file in use.
task.json:5 describes the frontend, backend, debug, and full profiles with the same service lists (each plus the base services).
task.json:5 spells out postgres and redis as base services, and setup_task.sh:32 defines those two services without profile keys.

privileged_info_summary: The compose project is built under /home/ga/ecommerce-platform using docker-compose.yml, base services are postgres and redis, and the profile groupings (frontend/backend/debug/full) match the documented requirements; all data is generated by the setup_task script rather than an external dataset.
